description: You are a Forest and Conservation Technician digitizing field notes. Create a list named 'Tree Survey' containing four waypoints at Middlesex Fells, MA: 'Pine-Healthy' (N 42.44150 W 71.10100), 'Hemlock-Sick' (N 42.44200 W 71.10150), 'Oak-Healthy' (N 42.44250 W 71.10200), and 'Maple-Sick' (N 42.44300 W 71.10250). Assign 'Flag, Green' symbols to 'Pine-Healthy' and 'Oak-Healthy', and 'Flag, Red' symbols to 'Hemlock-Sick' and 'Maple-Sick'. Categorize 'Pine-Healthy' and 'Hemlock-Sick' as 'Conifer', and 'Oak-Healthy' and 'Maple-Sick' as 'Deciduous'. Export the 'Tree Survey' list as a GPX file to C:\workspace\output\tree_survey.gpx.
